challenges.title: Filterable Gallery
challenges.description: Create a gallery with filter buttons (All, Nature, City, People) that show/hide images using CSS only (or with minimal JS for button interaction).
hints: Use data attributes on gallery items (e.g., data-category="nature")
Use :checked pseudo-class with radio buttons for filtering
Hide items with display: none when not matching filter

challenges.title: Lightbox Overlay
challenges.description: Build a CSS-only lightbox that shows a full-size image in an overlay when a thumbnail is clicked.
hints: Use :target pseudo-class to show the lightbox
Include a close link that removes the target

challenges.title: Responsive Grid with Featured Image
challenges.description: Design a gallery where the first image is larger (spans 2 columns and 2 rows) and the rest form a regular grid.
hints: Use grid-column and grid-row span values
Ensure it stays responsive on smaller screens
